fields.label: Party Role
fields.description: Applicant = filing party. Consultant/PRO = preparatory. PIC = legally named compliance officer (Food License). Officer = government reviewer.

fields.label: Party Identifier
fields.description: Emirates ID, trade license number, staff ID, or name — whatever uniquely identifies this party in context.

fields.label: Liability Type
fields.description: Preparatory = helps prepare but bears no legal filing liability. FilingAccountable = legally accountable for what is filed. FinanciallyLiable = bears financial obligation (fees, bonds). See v2 note: full liability model deferred.
